body.title: Consult prompt templates: reasoning-stuck + coding-stuck
body.result: build_system_prompt + build_state_message. Per-kind templates share register preamble (identity, DO NOT SOLVE, not-on-my-behalf), differ per-kind tail. State message canonical-ordered per kind. 19 tests. 6d7d5e15.
body.description:
Build wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult_prompts.py with two register-forcing prompt templates: REASONING_STUCK_PROMPT and CODING_STUCK_PROMPT. Each preamble frames the LLM as a peer consultant (not an answer-service): 'I am Igor, a graph matrix reasoning engine. I am stuck. Help me understand — do not solve. Return JSON with up to 3 hypotheses, one best next question, confidence 0-1. Do not generate code. Do not write the reply. Frame suggestions as questions.' JSON-mode forced; parsing tolerates minor drift.

**Affected files:** new wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult_prompts.py, tests/test_consult_prompts.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN — two prompt templates, JSON-mode enforcement, parse helper. OUT — routing decisions about which template fires when (call sites own that).
**Test plan:** verify templates mention Igor identity + 'do not solve' + JSON return shape; parse helper handles well-formed JSON, handles extra prose wrapping, raises on missing hypotheses/next_question fields.
